title: India has splurged billions on metro trains. But where are the commuters?
summary: On a weekday evening last month, Mumbai's southbound Aqua Line metro train nearly emptied out a couple of stops before the final one. meta.twitter:title: India has splurged billions on metro trains. But where are the commuters?
meta.og:description: Without better last-mile connectivity and affordable fares, metro use is unlikely to improve quickly, say experts.
